eta.basis: 50,605/90,432 raw outputs at 07:02; whole-run 1.50070 seq/s; 114-second recent output window 2.10526 seq/s; queued RFdiffusion/ProteinMPNN waves make instantaneous rate lumpy.
eta.confidence: RF75 medium; downstream coarse/low until MPNN75 smoke establishes measured throughput

input_prepared.gpu_plan: physical GPUs 1-7, three workers per GPU after RFantibody controller completes
input_prepared.scientific_boundary: Positive-pose-conditioned ProteinMPNN sequence proposal; not affinity or blocking proof.

prepared.duplicate_semantics: Deterministic first-half overlap with the 75k campaign is expected and must be removed by global exact-sequence deduplication.

production_verdict.reason: RF75 raw/freeze is not COMPLETE; existing RF75 controller and 7-GPU x 3-worker topology remain active, MPNN75 controller waits on RF75, and one strict watcher will continue the chain.
production_verdict.transition_policy: fail_closed: only COMPLETE plus nonempty status/controller.complete advances; HOLD/FAILED/BLOCKED stops the chain
